workflow_scope: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: Import, Model Health, Analysis Setup, Run & Monitor, Compare & Report
observer: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: UX research owner or human observer
completion_minutes: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: wall-clock minutes matching completed_at_utc - started_at_utc, numeric <= 30.0
evidence_ref: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: observation note, ticket, recording, or signed evidence bundle
approval_decision: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: accepted | approved | pass | signed | approved_for_release
note: Template only. Do not use as release evidence until populated from an observed first-time user workflow run.
